name: Gnocchi
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes in skins until just tender.
2. While hot, remove skins and press through potato ricer on a large mound on a floured surface.
3. Make a well in the middle and crack eggs into it.
4. Sprinkle salt around, and add 2 1/2 cups flour around it.
5. Mix eggs gently with potato and flour mixture until well incorporated.
6. Mix with hands into a ball and add more flour to dough until not sticky.
7. Place dough on side on floured surface.
8. Clean and flour working surface well.
9. Cut a piece of dough off and roll into a long snake-like form (about 1 inch around).
10. Cut into 1-inch pieces and place aside on floured surface to prevent sticking to board or each other.
11. When all pieces are cut, make grooves by gently rolling the edges with the side of a cheese grater, creating an indentation.
12. Have a large pot of salted water boiling.
13. Place half of the gnocchi into the boiling water and stir briefly before covering.
14. When water reboils, remove cover.
15. Remove gnocchi with a large slotted spoon when it rises to the top.
16. Place in serving bowl with sauce of choice and mix gently.
17. Repeat with remaining batch, adding more sauce and serve.
